REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-05-2004 IN DEPT. 303 - JUDGE PERKER L. MEEKS, JR., REPORTER MAURA BALDOCCHI, CLERK IRIS HAMMER, PETER H. LIEDERMAN, ESQ. FOR PLNTF. AND TONY C. LEE, DFT. IN PRO PER PRESENT IN COURT. AFTER HAVING CONSIDERED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD STATEMENTS FROM THE PARTIES, THE CCOURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $8544.08 PLUS $1200 ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $165.30 COSTS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT.
